news.title: Kraus named executive director of finance and budgeting for McKelvey Engineering
news.summary_en: She has more than 30 years of experience at WashU.

news.title: WashU launches doctoral program in neuroengineering
news.summary_en: The program, to begin in 2027, is among only a few in the United States.

news.title: Three McKelvey faculty elected to AAAS
news.summary_en: Yixin Chen, Lori Setton and Joshua Yuan were among eleven WashU faculty members elected.

news.title: New research on cellular redox reactions sheds light on the path to neurodegenerative diseases
news.summary_en: Yifan Dai and colleagues are reshaping our understanding of disease origins and revealing how these condensates can tip cells from normal behavior to dysfunction.
